_meta.update_instructions: Visit each exam's official site in October-November each year and update the dates below. Static fields (total_marks, passing_marks, attempts, pattern) rarely change — verify if there is a syllabus revision notification.
_meta.note: Days calculations are relative to reference_date. Recompute in app at runtime.

exams.popularity_note: ~13 lakh applicants annually. Gateway to NITs, IIITs, GFTIs and JEE Advanced (IITs).

fees.note: Session 2 fees. Session 1 fees were similar.

qualifying.passing_note: No minimum passing marks for JEE Main itself. For JEE Advanced eligibility, top 2.5 lakh qualifiers are selected. For NITs/IIITs/GFTIs, rank-based counselling via JoSAA.
qualifying.board_requirement: 75% in Class 12 or top 20 percentile in board

attempts.note: 3 consecutive years. Can attempt both sessions (Jan + Apr) each year. Best of two NTA scores is used.

app_display.registration_note: Session 2 registration closed (Feb 25, re-opened Mar 12–13). Exam Apr 2–9.

contact.address: NSIC-MDBP Building, First Floor, Okhla Industrial Estate, New Delhi – 110020
contact.note: NTA central helpdesk handles both JEE sessions. Expect delays during peak registration.

exams.popularity_note: ~20 lakh applicants annually. Only gateway to MBBS/BDS in India.

qualifying.passing_note: General category must score at least 50th percentile (~360+ marks). SC/ST/OBC at 40th percentile (~288+ marks). PwD at 45th percentile.
qualifying.board_requirement: 50% in PCB in Class 12 (40% for SC/ST/OBC)

attempts.note: No upper limit on attempts. Held once a year.

sessions.note: Dates based on NTA pattern — verify at neet.nta.nic.in when officially announced

pcm_eligibility.condition: PCM students are eligible for NEET if they have passed Biology or Biotechnology as an additional/optional subject from a recognised board.
pcm_eligibility.nmc_ruling: NMC (National Medical Commission) confirmed under GMER-2023 regulations. NIOS is a recognised board.
pcm_eligibility.legal_note: Admission is currently subject to pending Supreme Court Special Leave Petitions. Students are allowed to appear provisionally.
pcm_eligibility.recommended_route: NIOS Biology (Subject Code 314) as additional subject via On-Demand Exam or public exam.
pcm_eligibility.aggregate_required: 50% in PCB combined for General category. 40% for SC/ST/OBC. English must be passed but not counted in aggregate.
pcm_eligibility.source: NMC notice U/114021/01/2024-UGMEB, careers360.com, physicsnavigator.in — March 2026

contact.address: NTA, C-20 1A/8, Sector 62, NOIDA, Uttar Pradesh – 201309
contact.note: Same NTA helpdesk as JEE. Email response within 36–72 hours.

exams.popularity_note: ~2.5 lakh applicants. Mandatory for Karnataka govt engineering/medical seats. Very affordable fees.

qualifying.passing_note: Rank-based counselling. No minimum cutoff — rank determines college allocation. Karnataka domicile required for most seats.
qualifying.board_requirement: Must have studied in Karnataka for 7 years or parents working in Karnataka govt service

attempts.note: No limit on attempts. Held once a year.

contact.address: Karnataka Examinations Authority, 18th Cross, Sampige Road, Malleswaram, Bangalore – 560012
contact.note: Multiple phone lines. Use counselling helpline during seat allotment period.

exams.popularity_note: ~2.5 lakh applicants. VIT Vellore and Chennai campuses combined. Strong placement record.

qualifying.passing_note: No strict cutoff. Rank-based allotment. Top ~10,000 ranks get CS/ECE at Vellore campus.

sessions.note: Slot-based exam — candidates choose their preferred date and city

app_display.registration_note: Application deadline extended. Check viteee.vit.ac.in for latest date. Exam Apr 28–May 3.

contact.note: Use ugadmission@vit.ac.in for VITEEE B.Tech queries. Chennai campus has separate contact.

exams.conducting_body: SRM Institute of Science and Technology
exams.popularity_note: ~1.5 lakh applicants. SRM Kattankulathur (Chennai), Amaravati, Vadapalani campuses.

exam_pattern.mode: Computer Based Test (CBT) — Remote Proctored or Centre

qualifying.passing_note: Rank-based. Top ranks get CSE/ECE at main Kattankulathur campus.

app_display.registration_note: Phase 1 registration open until Apr 16. Phase 2 & 3 dates TBA.

contact.address: Directorate of Admissions, SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Kattankulathur – 603203, Tamil Nadu
contact.fraud_warning: Official website is srmist.edu.in only. Report fake sites to cyberwatchdog@srmist.edu.in
contact.note: SRM explicitly warns about fraudulent calls/SMS/WhatsApp. Only contact via official channels.

exams.popularity_note: ~1 lakh applicants. MIT Manipal, Manipal Jaipur, SMIT campuses. Strong research culture.

fees.note: Phase 1 registration fee. Phase 2 is separate application.

exam_pattern.note: Can be taken from home — no exam centre required

qualifying.board_requirement: 50% in Maths, Physics, and one of Chemistry/Biotechnology/Biology in Class 12

attempts.note: Phase 1 (Apr) and Phase 2 (May) available. Best score considered.

app_display.registration_note: Phase 1 registration closed Mar 23. Phase 2 open Apr 27–May 26. Exam Phase 1: Apr 13–14.

contact.address: Admissions Office, MAHE, Madhav Nagar, Manipal – 576104, Karnataka
contact.note: Use toll-free 1800-102-6781 for slot booking queries. admissions@manipal.edu for general queries.

exams.official_name: Consortium of Medical Engineering and Dental Colleges of Karnataka — Undergraduate Entrance Test
exams.popularity_note: ~1.5 lakh applicants. Gateway to ~190 private engineering colleges in Karnataka. Good alternative to KCET.

qualifying.passing_note: 45% for general, 40% for SC/ST. Rank-based counselling for 190+ colleges.

app_display.registration_note: Registration closed Mar 23. Correction window Apr 10–13. Exam May 9.

contact.address: #132, Second Floor, 11th Main, 17th Cross, Malleswaram, Bangalore – 560055
contact.note: COMEDK is strict about office hours. Raise clarification requests through official portal (₹500 fee per clarification + refundable if upheld).

exams.conducting_body: IISER (Indian Institutes of Science Education and Research)
exams.popularity_note: ~30,000 applicants. Highly selective. Free tuition + stipend for BS-MS students. Only for science stream.

fees.note: No application fee — IISER charges zero fee for IAT registration

qualifying.passing_note: No minimum marks. Rank-based. Top ranks from JEE Advanced, KVPY, and IAT are eligible for IISER admissions.
qualifying.board_requirement: 60% in PCM/PCB in Class 12. KVPY/JEE Advanced qualification also provides direct entry channel.

attempts.note: Can attempt multiple years. Science stream (PCB or PCM) only.

sessions.note: IAT 2026 confirmed: exam June 7, 2026. IISER Berhampur is organising institute. 11 participating institutes including IIT Madras, IIT Guwahati, IISc, IACS Kolkata, IIEST Shibpur.

app_display.registration_note: Registration open until Apr 13, 11:55 PM. Exam Jun 7.

contact.address: Joint Admission Committee, IISER Berhampur (Organising Institute for IAT 2026), Berhampur – 760010, Odisha
contact.note: IISER Berhampur is the organising institute for IAT 2026. Very limited hours — try email first.
contact.source: freepressjournal.in IISER IAT 2026 registration article, March 5, 2026

exams.popularity_note: ~50,000 applicants. Top private engineering university in Bangalore. NAAC A+. Strong placements — median ₹12.47 LPA (2025).
exams.important_note_2026: PESSAT is NO LONGER conducted for B.Tech admissions from 2026 onwards. B.Tech admission is now via JEE Main or KCET scores. Students must separately apply on the PES admissions portal after results are out. PESSAT continues for BBA, BCA, B.Des, B.Pharm, Law and PG programs.

btech_admission_2026.note: Apply on PES portal after JEE/KCET results. Upload scorecard. Separate from exam registration.

fees.note: PESSAT fee for non-BTech programs. BTech applicants only need to register on PES portal.

exam_pattern.note: PESSAT for BTech discontinued 2026. For BTech, uses JEE Main / KCET pattern.

qualifying.passing_note: For BTech: rank-based on JEE Main percentile or KCET rank. No minimum JEE percentile stated, but practically 85+ percentile for CSE/ECE. KCET rank below 5000 for good branches.

attempts.note: PESSAT: once per year. JEE Main: 2 sessions per year. No limit on total yearly attempts.

sessions.label: BTech via JEE/KCET — PES portal application
sessions.note: Apply on admissions.pes.edu after JEE Main Session 2 results (Apr 20) or KCET results (May 30)

app_display.registration_note: BTech: Apply on admissions.pes.edu after JEE/KCET results. No PESSAT for BTech 2026. PESSAT for other programs open until Apr 30.
app_display.next_actionable_label: JEE results out — apply on PES portal

campuses: Ring Road Campus (RR) — Main campus, Bangalore

contact.address: PES University, 100 Feet Ring Road, BSK III Stage, Bangalore – 560085
contact.note: Use admissions@pes.edu for BTech (JEE/KCET route) queries. Use pessat@pes.edu for PESSAT (non-BTech) queries.

nios_biology_route._description: This section powers the PCM → NEET pathway screen in After12. Shown only when student selects PCM stream in settings.

summary.what: A PCM Class 12 student can appear for Biology as an additional subject through NIOS (National Institute of Open Schooling) and become eligible for NEET UG.
summary.why_nios: NIOS is fully recognised by NMC and NTA. It allows single-subject registration — you only need to add Biology, not repeat all of Class 12.
summary.timeline: Fastest route: register now → appear in ODE (On-Demand Exam) in 2–3 months → get result in ~45 days → apply for NEET next cycle.

subject.name: Biology
subject.practical_note: Theory + Practical both required. Practicals conducted at NIOS accredited study centres. Must complete practical before NEET counselling.
subject.syllabus: NCERT Biology Class 11 and 12 — same syllabus as NEET Biology. Highly aligned.

route_a.name: Public Exam (recommended for most students)
route_a.description: Register for NIOS Sr. Secondary as a new learner. Appear in the scheduled April/May or October/November public exam.

admission_streams.note: Best if you have 6+ months. Study alongside JEE prep.

fees.note: Fees vary slightly by stream and category. SC/ST may get concession.

how_to_apply: Upload Class 12 marksheet (PCM), Aadhaar, photo, signature
You will receive an Enrolment Number — save it
Pay exam fee separately when the exam fee window opens
Download hall ticket from nios.ac.in before exam
route_a.result_timeline: June 2026 for April/May session. December 2026 for Oct/Nov session.

route_b.name: On-Demand Exam / ODES (fastest route)
route_b.description: Existing NIOS learners can appear for Biology whenever they are ready — no fixed exam date. Exam held monthly except April, May, October, November.
route_b.eligibility_note: Must already be a registered NIOS learner (have an Enrolment Number). Stream 1 learners can use ODES only after appearing in their first public exam.
how_to_apply: Log in at nios.ac.in with your Enrolment Number
Choose preferred exam centre and date
Appear for exam at selected NIOS centre or Kendriya Vidyalaya
route_b.result_timeline: Results declared within 45 days of exam. Published at results.nios.ac.in.
route_b.centres: NIOS HQ (Noida) and selected Kendriya Vidyalayas across India. Not available in all cities — check nios.ac.in for centre list.

step_by_step_for_pcm_student.detail: You need 50% aggregate in PCB (Physics + Chemistry + Biology combined) for NEET eligibility. Since you have PCM, your Physics and Chemistry marks will carry over. Your Biology score from NIOS will be the third component.
step_by_step_for_pcm_student.tip: If you scored 70%+ in PCM, getting 50% aggregate in PCB is very achievable even with moderate Biology marks.

step_by_step_for_pcm_student.detail: Visit sdmis.nios.ac.in. Register under Stream 2, 3, or 4 if you have already passed Class 12. You are adding a single additional subject — not re-doing Class 12.
step_by_step_for_pcm_student.tip: Stream 2/3/4 is for students who have already passed 12th from another board. This is your stream.
step_by_step_for_pcm_student.fee: ~₹720 per subject for Stream 2/3/4 (includes registration + exam fee)

step_by_step_for_pcm_student.detail: NIOS Biology syllabus (Code 314) is nearly identical to NEET Biology. Use NCERT Class 11 and 12 Biology textbooks. This is the same material you would study for NEET anyway.
step_by_step_for_pcm_student.tip: Focus on Chapters: Cell Biology, Genetics, Human Physiology, Plant Physiology, Ecology, Evolution. These are high-weight in both NIOS and NEET.

step_by_step_for_pcm_student.detail: Biology has a practical exam at an NIOS accredited study centre. This is mandatory — without the practical, NIOS will not issue the marksheet, and NEET counselling will reject your documents.
step_by_step_for_pcm_student.tip: Book your practical slot early. Practical centres fill up. Contact your nearest NIOS Regional Centre at 1800-180-9393.

step_by_step_for_pcm_student.action: Appear for the exam and get your marksheet
step_by_step_for_pcm_student.detail: Once you pass, NIOS issues a marksheet. Keep both your original Class 12 board marksheet (PCM) AND the NIOS Biology marksheet. NTA recognises NIOS as equivalent for NEET.
step_by_step_for_pcm_student.tip: Results declared in June (Apr session) or December (Oct session). ODE results within 45 days.

step_by_step_for_pcm_student.action: Apply for NEET with both marksheets
step_by_step_for_pcm_student.detail: When filling the NEET application form, select the appropriate eligibility code for 'Additional subject from different board'. Upload both marksheets during NEET counselling.
step_by_step_for_pcm_student.tip: Keep originals safe. NEET counselling requires in-person document verification.

important_warnings.detail: As of 2026, PCM students with additional Biology are allowed to appear for NEET provisionally. There are pending Supreme Court Special Leave Petitions (SLPs) filed by MCI. Final admission to MBBS is subject to the court's decision. Monitor NMC website for updates.
Do not skip the Biology practical. Without it, your NIOS marksheet will be incomplete and NEET counselling will reject your documents.
NMC requires Biology to have been studied for both Class 11 and 12. NIOS Biology (Code 314) covers both years' syllabus in one exam — this satisfies the requirement.

important_warnings.warning: NIOS not available in all cities for ODE
important_warnings.detail: On-Demand Exams are only at NIOS HQ (Noida) and selected Kendriya Vidyalayas. Public exams (Apr/May, Oct/Nov) have wider centre availability across India.

app_config.show_this_screen: Only when student selects PCM stream in Settings
app_config.screen_subtitle: PCM students can add Biology via NIOS and become NEET eligible
